checks.name: strict_compose_bringup
checks.command: STRICT_UPSTREAM_URL='https://mock-mcp-server:8082/mcp' APPROVAL_SIGNING_KEY='compose-approval-signing-key-material-at-least-32' UPSTREAM_AUTHZ_ALLOWED_SPIFFE_IDS='spiffe://poc.local/ns/tools/sa/mcp-tool' KEYDB_AUTHZ_ALLOWED_SPIFFE_IDS='spiffe://poc.local/ns/data/sa/keydb' docker compose --profile strict -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.strict.yml up -d --build --wait mcp-security-gateway
checks.evidence: gateway container healthy in strict profile

checks.name: strict_runtime_wiring
checks.evidence: strict K8s overlays + strict compose wiring checks passed

checks.name: compose_runtime_hardening
checks.evidence: no-new-privileges, cap_drop=ALL, non-root runtime checks passed

checks.name: k8s_overlay_and_security_wiring
checks.evidence: kustomize + kubeconform + admission wiring + network policy wiring + strict runtime wiring passed

checks.name: unauthorized_admin_action_denied
checks.evidence: admin endpoint request without SPIFFE identity denied (401)

checks.name: direct_egress_bypass_denied
checks.evidence: model plane rejects direct_egress / mediation_mode=direct with reason MODEL_PROVIDER_DIRECT_EGRESS_BLOCKED

checks.name: network_egress_bypass_denied
checks.evidence: public internet egress attempt failed (timeout) from internal-only network

checks.name: unsigned_artifact_denied_strict_startup
checks.evidence: strict startup fails when tool registry signature is missing

checks.name: unsigned_or_bad_signature_reload_denied
checks.evidence: attestation-enabled watcher rejects unsigned and bad-signature updates

checks.name: readiness_state_integrity
checks.evidence: docs/status snapshot matches live bd story state

checks.name: security_evidence_gate
checks.evidence: strict security scan evidence generation + validation passed

closure_prerequisites.status_summary: all required closure stories are closed with PM acceptance recorded in story notes

go_no_go.decision_rule: GO only when closure stories RFA-l6h6.7.1 through RFA-l6h6.7.6 are accepted and all campaign checks pass
go_no_go.rationale: Compose strict, K8s strict validation suite, adversarial denial checks, readiness-state integrity, and security evidence gates all passed. OpenClaw story remains dependency-gated until this campaign story is accepted and closed.

residual_risks: K8s strict evidence in this repository is based on rendered-manifest and policy wiring validation, not external cloud staging/prod runtime deployment proof.
bd accepted-label persistence is inconsistent for some previously accepted stories; PM acceptance is recorded in notes and closure state.
